A **Data Scientist** at **Gartner** plays a pivotal role in translating complex, high-volume data into actionable insights that empower executive leaders worldwide to make mission-critical decisions. Unlike traditional technology firms where data science might focus solely on optimizing ad click-through rates or app engagement, **Gartner** leverages data science to fuel its industry-leading research, advisory services, and proprietary benchmarking platforms. You will work at the intersection of advanced analytics, machine learning, and business strategy to build models that extract deep meaning from vast repositories of structured and unstructured data.
...
In this role, your models and insights will directly influence products and tools used by Fortune 500 executives. Whether you are developing natural language processing (NLP) pipelines to analyze thousands of proprietary research documents, building predictive engines to forecast technology trends, or designing recommendation algorithms for client portals, your work will have a high-leverage impact. The data environment at **Gartner** is rich and intellectually stimulating, requiring a balance of rigorous scientific methodology and practical business application.
...
To succeed as a **Data Scientist** here, you must possess not only technical excellence but also a strong consultative mindset. You will collaborate closely with product managers, software engineers, and research analysts. The hiring team looks for candidates who can look past the math to understand the "why" behind a business problem, designing scalable machine learning solutions that directly address real-world client challenges.

# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services

About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
